text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ow, ow, ow... Been a while since I've<n>gotten this
sore... Talk about lame...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday I found a car that had run into<n>the
ditch. These aches and pains are<n>from dragging it
back onto the road.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The old lady driving was fine, and I<n>managed to
get the tires too, but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't know, the fact that something so<n>small
wore me out is so uncool...
